name: BambooHR
description: BambooHR is a cloud-based human resources platform for managing employee data, time-off requests, and company directories. The API enables programmatic access to employee records, time-off management, job information, reports, and organizational metadata.

auth.note: Use Basic auth with base64(api_key:x). The 'x' is a literal character as the password.

capabilities.name: employees_list
capabilities.description: Get the employee directory with names, departments, and job titles.

capabilities.name: employees_get
capabilities.description: Get detailed information about a specific employee.

capabilities.name: employees_create
capabilities.description: Add a new employee to the company directory.

capabilities.name: time_off_requests_list
capabilities.description: List time-off requests with filtering by employee, status, or date range.

capabilities.name: time_off_request_create
capabilities.description: Submit a new time-off request for an employee.

capabilities.name: time_off_balances_get
capabilities.description: Get current time-off balances for an employee.

capabilities.name: time_off_types_list
capabilities.description: List all time-off types configured for the company.

capabilities.name: time_off_policies_list
capabilities.description: List all time-off policies available for employees.

capabilities.name: whos_out
capabilities.description: View who is currently out or will be out within a date range.

capabilities.name: tables_get_rows
capabilities.description: Get tabular data rows for an employee (job info, compensation, etc.).

capabilities.name: tables_add_row
capabilities.description: Add a new row to an employee's tabular data.

capabilities.name: reports_get_company
capabilities.description: Run a saved company report and retrieve results.

capabilities.name: reports_request_custom
capabilities.description: Request a custom report specifying which fields to include.

capabilities.name: metadata_fields_list
capabilities.description: List all employee fields available in your BambooHR account.

capabilities.name: metadata_tables_list
capabilities.description: List all tabular data tables and their fields.

capabilities.name: metadata_users_list
capabilities.description: List all BambooHR system users and access levels.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a webhook for employee data change notifications.
